pairs.question: What was the 87th season of the Ranji Trophy and when did it take place?
pairs.answer: The 87th season of the Ranji Trophy, the premier first-class cricket tournament in India, was the 2021–22 Ranji Trophy. The league stage was played from 17 February to 15 March 2022, and the knockout phase was held from 6 to 26 June 2022.

pairs.question: How many Elite groups were teams split into during the 2021–22 Ranji Trophy due to the COVID-19 pandemic, and why?
pairs.answer: Teams were split into eight Elite groups instead of the usual five due to the delayed start of the tournament caused by the COVID-19 pandemic.

pairs.question: Who was the first player to score a triple century on their first-class debut in the 2021–22 Ranji Trophy, and what was their score?
pairs.answer: Sakibul Gani of Bihar became the first player to score a triple century on their first-class debut. He scored 341 runs in their Plate Group match against Mizoram.

pairs.question: Which seven teams qualified for the quarter-finals of the 2021–22 Ranji Trophy, and how did Nagaland and Jharkhand advance?
pairs.answer: Madhya Pradesh, Bengal, Karnataka, Mumbai, Uttarakhand, Punjab, and Uttar Pradesh qualified for the quarter-finals by winning their respective Elite Groups. Jharkhand won Group H and advanced directly, while Nagaland won the Plate Group and played a pre-quarter-final match to advance.

pairs.question: What was the highest team total in the Ranji Trophy during the 2021–22 season, and which team achieved it?
pairs.answer: Jharkhand scored the fourth-highest team total in Ranji Trophy history with 880 runs in the first innings of their preliminary quarter-final match.

pairs.question: What was the biggest first-class cricket lead achieved by Jharkhand in the 2021–22 Ranji Trophy, and what was the context?
pairs.answer: Jharkhand extended their lead to 1,008 runs in the first-class cricket, the biggest ever lead, based on their first innings lead against an opponent after being bowled out for 880 runs.

pairs.question: How did Mumbai qualify for the final of the 2021–22 Ranji Trophy despite a drawn semi-final?
pairs.answer: Mumbai advanced to the final due to having a first-innings lead in their drawn semi-final match against Uttar Pradesh.

pairs.question: Which team won the 2021–22 Ranji Trophy, and what was the result of the final?
pairs.answer: Madhya Pradesh won the 2021–22 Ranji Trophy by beating Mumbai by six wickets in the final. This marked their first Ranji Trophy title since the 1998–99 edition.
